context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: How do I instrument a Go application to send metrics and traces to Coralogix ap2 region?

checklist.name: no-if-it-recommends-go-auto-instrumentation-o
checklist.description: Covers Go manual instrumentation (code or detailed prose both acceptable) with: TLS credentials (credentials.NewTLS(nil)) on all exporters, an Authorization header map ("Bearer " + token — note literal space), the coralogix-opentelemetry-go sampler for APM transactions, and the endpoint ingress.ap2.coralogix.com:443 without an https:// scheme in the gRPC dial options. FAIL if it recommends Go auto-instrumentation, omits credentials.NewTLS(nil), or uses https:// in the gRPC endpoint.
